ChangeGroups.Name: Stability hotfix
Changes: Disposed temporary Unity query arrays more explicitly to avoid JobTempAlloc leak warnings.
Registered the budget array reader dependency used by the custom money apply job.
No economy balance or gameplay feature changes were made in this release.

ChangeGroups.Name: Metadata-only maintenance release
Changes: Added a visible Paradox Mods changelog entry for the 2026-06-04 maintenance update.
Updated the public compatibility note to Cities: Skylines II 1.5.10f1.
Added the Paradox forum bug-report link and updated the public GitHub source link.
No gameplay or economy logic changes were made in this release.

ChangeGroups.Name: Unofficial continuation
Changes: Repaired building demolition cost deduction for current game versions.
Added clearer difficulty descriptions and public release notes.
Kept demolition costs limited to buildings; network demolitions remain free.
Cleaned up obsolete budget UI entry and release metadata.

ChangeGroups.Name: Changes
Changes: Updated for Economy 2.0, updated all economy modifiers to accommodate for the changes in the new patch.
